function.message: Completed the next inbox request. I added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to all 8 specified finance records (4 invoices, 4 bills), preserved each original note body verbatim below frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS and relevant workflow/schema docs before edits, preserved full original body text under frontmatter for each migrated record, and removed inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to run 8 listed finance docs through OCR workflow. Each listed file was read, then updated to include required invoice/bill frontmatter fields and line entries per finance schema, with body preserved verbatim; after all updates, inbox file was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update guidance.
